required_protocol_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
assignment: Progression work in the shared publishing clone. Add concise, meaningful TSDoc only to source interface declarations that the public-contract checker reports in public_api_tsdoc_gaps. Do not add inline or block comments, document non-public interfaces, change runtime behavior, rename symbols, add facade types, or edit Markdown, manifests, changesets, scripts, tests, .okra, or generated dist. Rebuild affected packages and run the exact public-contract checker with /tmp/pr-346-contract-local-head.json adjusted to the resulting working tree HEAD expectation only where needed. The target is public_api_tsdoc_gap_count=0; all other contract metrics must not regress.

budget_and_stop_rule.stop: Stop when the TSDoc denominator reaches zero or when a source-to-declaration mapping cannot be proven. Do not commit.

output_schema: Changed path list, before/after TSDoc metrics, exact build/check commands, failures, and wall reads. Worker evidence is not acceptance.
